forms.name: Auth Service
forms.description: JWT/IDP bridge realizing F.1 authN/authZ. Binds DE.12 session tokens to project scope per FM.08 mitigation.

forms.name: Spec Generator (Primary LLM)
forms.description: Primary LLM adapter for F.2 spec generation; grounded-retrieval gate enforces NFR.01 citation floor.

forms.name: Spec Generator (Fallback LLM)
forms.description: Secondary LLM provider for F.2; circuit-breaker fallback when primary DE.13 path unavailable (FM.12 mitigation).

forms.name: Review Gate Service
forms.description: Realizes F.3; enforces OR.1 guard with compliance-policy digest check (NFR.02).

forms.name: CLI Bundle Emitter
forms.description: Realizes F.4; produces DE.06 + DE.15 with redaction pass (FM.09 mitigation); content-addressed spec_id check (NFR.03).

forms.name: Customer-System Adapter
forms.description: Realizes F.5 connect-adapter; self-meters overhead against MAX_CUSTOMER_SYSTEM_OVERHEAD_PCT=2 (NFR.04).

forms.name: Metric Ingest Service
forms.description: Realizes F.6 ingest half; heartbeat + gap-marker pipeline (NFR.05) over DE.08 metric stream.

forms.name: Recommendation Engine
forms.description: Realizes F.6 recommend half; bounded-queue + shed-load (FM.06 mitigation); emits DE.10.

forms.name: Traceback Service
forms.description: Realizes F.7; fail-closed on missing citations (FM.07 mitigation); consumes DE.09 catalog + DE.08 samples.

forms.name: Audit Event Store
forms.description: Cross-cutting store realizing CC.R02 audit trail for F.2/F.3/F.4/F.5/F.6 state mutations (FM.10 mitigation).

alternatives.dominance_rationale: Primary LLM path — lowest latency, highest fidelity when DE.13 is available.
Fallback LLM — preserves availability per FM.12 mitigation when primary is down.
Ingest-first — heartbeat + gap-marker (NFR.05) takes precedence over recommend latency.
Recommend-first — bounded-queue shed-load (FM.06) maintains RECOMMENDATION_CADENCE_MIN.
Primary adapter — self-metered against NFR.04 non-invasive budget.
Audit-cross-cut — capture adapter wiring events even when adapter refuses start-up.

decision_audit.subject: FR.01 ↔ F.1 quality score
decision_audit.rationale: High specificity (single auth concern) × low coupling (downstream forms depend only on CC.R01 contract) per Stevens1974 coupling-cohesion framing applied via Bass2021 Ch.8 modifiability lens.

decision_audit.subject: F.2 redundancy via FR.03 fallback
decision_audit.rationale: FMEA FM.12 mitigation text 'multi-provider Integration.LLM adapter with circuit breaker' crossed the redundancy-keyword threshold; agent promoted F.2 to redundancy-required, emitting FR.03 with redundancy_source_fm=FM.12.

decision_audit.subject: FR.10 Audit Event Store Q-penalty
decision_audit.rationale: Cross-cutting forms score low specificity by Stevens1974 definition (many functions realized) and high coupling by Bass2021 (broad dependency fan-in). Retained as secondary mapping — not a primary form for any function.
